While we don' t strictly adhere to a budget, my wife and I make sure to prioritize our spending on essential items such as housing, utilities, food, and transportation costs. After taking care of these necessities, we allocate any remaining funds towards savings or discretionary spending. Overall, we believe in being mindful of our financial situation while still allowing ourselves some flexibility to enjoy life.
